title: Prisoner's Dilemma and Contractualism
description: Use a cooperation dilemma to test principles of fairness and mutual agreement.

steps.text: Two agents can cooperate or defect, with outcomes favoring mutual cooperation but rewarding unilateral defection.
Test the mutual-benefit principle against your judgment.
Contractualism asks what principles no one could reasonably reject.

steps.notes: Check coherence between the principle and contractualist framing.

steps.text: Add fairness as a constraint on strategic advantage.

steps.prompt: Would you revise the principle or your judgment to restore coherence?
